title: SceneWorks Style Catalog Manifest
description: The built-in Style catalog served at GET /api/v1/styles and folded server-side into a prompt carrying a styleId (sc-13134). This manifest is a mechanical derivation of documents/style.txt via apps/web/scripts/generate-styles.mjs and MUST NOT be hand-edited; the styleCatalog.test.js drift guard fails CI if it diverges from styles.json.

source.description: The authored file this catalog is derived from (documents/style.txt).

promptTemplate.description: The two-field composition template the client and server both apply: "Subject: {subject}\nStyle: {style}".

groups.description: Top-level style groups. A group's `id` may itself be selected as a style (the group's `description` is used as the style text); every sub-style `id` is globally unique across all groups so a stored styleId resolves unambiguously.
